name: CMC Telecom
notes:
CMC Telecom is Vietnam's leading Service Provider and the only 100% private telecommunication company in Vietnam with foreign shareholders, jointly owned by Vietnam's CMC Corporation and TIME dotCom (Malaysia's second largest fixed-line telecommunication service provider). CMC Telecom's vision is to become a Regional Digital Infrastructure and Comprehensive Services Provider. We proudly operate three cutting-edge, carrier-neutral data centers in Vietnam and hold the largest capacity port connection to VNIX, the only and government-regulated Internet Exchange in Vietnam. We are pleased to share our peering information with ASN 45903 and welcome all peering requests from global partners, particularly those seeking Vietnam eyeball access. Our interconnection locations include Singapore, Hong Kong, and Amsterdam.
We look forward to partnering on all IP and data center requirements across Vietnam and the Southeast Asia region.
